category_sources: Official FVM documentation says FVM manages Flutter SDK versions for projects.
source_facts.description says it manages Flutter SDK versions per project.
display_name_sources: Official fvm.app documentation and GitHub README use FVM as the project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the fvm.app Getting Started guide and FAQ.
Official fvm.app documentation has installation and command reference pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/leoafarias/fvm, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official FVM docs describe commands for Flutter SDK versions and project configuration.
source_facts.description identifies Flutter SDK version management.
